name: Mahjong
short_description: You have to match tiles in pairs until all of tiles are gone. Once two tiles have been matched, they will disappear. When you click on a tile - it becomes highlighted. You can select a tile, when it has at least one side edge free. No other tiles touching it, and cannot have any tiles on top of it.
detailed_description:
You have to match tiles in pairs until all of tiles are gone.

Once two tiles have been matched, they will disappear.

When you click on a tile - it becomes highlighted.

You can select a tile, when it has at least one side edge free.

(no other tiles touching it, and cannot have any tiles on top of it).

By purchasing the game, you will get the opportunity to complete 100 levels in this exciting board and logic game Mahjong.
about_the_game:
You have to match tiles in pairs until all of tiles are gone.

Once two tiles have been matched, they will disappear.

When you click on a tile - it becomes highlighted.

You can select a tile, when it has at least one side edge free.

(no other tiles touching it, and cannot have any tiles on top of it).

By purchasing the game, you will get the opportunity to complete 100 levels in this exciting board and logic game Mahjong.
